name: codex-flows-author
description: Codex turn automation and advanced flow package authoring guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Author turn automations and advanced flow packages.
interface.longDescription: codex-flows author installs Codex-facing guidance for plugin-native turn automation scripts and advanced durable flow packages. It does not install local backend hooks or start a backend process.
defaultPrompt: Author a turn automation script that can skip or start a Codex turn.
Author an advanced reusable Codex flow package.
